title: Deesix (disambiguation)
content:
'''Deesix''' could refer to:
*[[R2-D6]], an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*[[D6-L5]], a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] used by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]

{{Disambig}}
